# --- Unity Folders ---
[Library]/
[Temp]/
[Obj]/
[Build]/
[Builds]/
[Logs]/
[MemoryCaptures]/
[UserSettings]/

# --- Asset Metadata ---
# Only ignore metadata if it's generated by the project, 
# but generally, you want to keep .meta files in Git.
# The following are specific temp files:
/[Assets]/*.tmp
/[Assets]/*.backup
/[Assets]/*.sample

# --- Build Outputs ---
*.apk
*.unitypackage
*.app
*.exe
*.dll
*.pdb
*.mdb

# --- IDE & OS Specific ---
.vs/
.vscode/
.gradle/
*.csproj
*.sln
*.suo
*.user
*.userprefs
*.pidb
*.booproj
*.svd
*.pdb
*.opendb
*.db

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# --- Crashlytics/Analytics ---
sysinfo.txt

# --- Assets generated by Unity (Exclude if you want to keep them) ---
/[Assets]/AssetStorePackages/
